LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF BANK OF AMERICA, N.A.'S MOTION TO ENFORCE SETTLEMENT (C.C.P. SECTION 664.6).GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED AND GOOD CAUSE SHOWN. PLAINTIFF BANK OF AMERICA, N.A, IS ENTITLED TO JUDGEMENT IN ITS FAVOR AND AGAINST DEFENDANT IRINA VARTANYAN IN THE AMOUNT OF $2,686.23 PLUS COSTS OF $245. COUNSEL FOR THE PREVAILING PARTY IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH REPEATS VERBATIM THE COURT'S RULING AND MUST DROP A HARD COURTESY COPY IN DEPT. 302'S INBOX.JUDGE: HAROLD E. KAHN; CLERK: M. MACADANGDANG; NOT REPORTED. (302/HEK)

calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-02-2026 Continued To Jul-21-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: Kenneth Tsang, Esq. specially appeared for plaintiff. The Order to Show Cause is re-set to July 21, 2026 at 10:30am in Department 610. Judge: Rochelle East; Clerk Z. Dizon; Proceedings not reported. (610)

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-19-2026 Continued To Jun-02-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion To Enforce Settlement (C.C.P. Section 664.6)
Off Calendar Jun-09-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF BANK OF AMERICA, N.A.'s Motion To Enforce Settlement (C.C.P. Section 664.6).

Granted. No opposition filed and good cause shown. Plaintiff Bank of America, N.A, is entitled to judgement in its favor and against defendant Irina Vartanyan in the amount of $2,686.23 plus costs of $245.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the court's ruling and must drop a hard courtesy copy in Dept. 302's inbox.

Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Clerk: M. Macadangdang; Not Reported. (302/HEK)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-20-2025 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Mar-24-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-20-2024 Continued To Feb-25-25 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-25-2024 Continued To Dec-24-24 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: Kenneth Tsang, Esq., specially appearing for the plaintiff. The Order to Show Cause is re-set to December 24, 2024 at 10:30am in Department 610. Judge: Samuel K. Feng; Clerk: M. Macadangdang; Proceedings not reported. (610)
